title: Reforestation Fights Climate Change
subtitle: 种树真的能拯救地球吗？科学家这样说

paragraphs.en: Reforestation has emerged as a popular strategy in the fight against climate change. Trees absorb carbon dioxide from the atmosphere during photosynthesis, potentially offsetting human emissions. Governments and corporations have pledged to plant billions of trees, with some claiming this approach could significantly mitigate global warming.
paragraphs.zh: 植树造林已成为应对气候变化的流行策略。树木在光合作用过程中从大气中吸收二氧化碳，有可能抵消人类的排放。政府和企业已承诺种植数十亿棵树，一些人声称这种方法可以显著缓解全球变暖。

paragraphs.en: Scientists caution that tree planting is more complex than it appears. The location, species selection, and long-term maintenance all dramatically affect whether forests actually benefit the climate. Poorly planned projects can even worsen environmental conditions or displace communities dependent on existing landscapes.
paragraphs.zh: 科学家警告说，植树比看起来要复杂得多。位置、树种选择和长期维护都会极大地影响森林是否真正有利于气候。规划不善的项目甚至可能恶化环境条件或使依赖现有景观的社区流离失所。

paragraphs.en: Monoculture plantations—vast areas of single tree species—offer limited ecological value compared to diverse native forests. Such plantations may serve as industrial timber sources while providing minimal habitat for wildlife. True ecological restoration requires reestablishing complex ecosystems, not merely planting rows of identical saplings.
paragraphs.zh: 单一栽培种植园——种植单一树种的大片区域——与多样的原生森林相比，生态价值有限。这些种植园可能作为工业木材来源，但为野生动物提供的栖息地很少。真正的生态恢复需要重建复杂的生态系统，而不仅仅是种植成排相同的树苗。

paragraphs.en: Indigenous communities possess invaluable knowledge about forest management developed over generations. Their stewardship has often proven more effective at preserving forests than conventional conservation programs. Successful reforestation increasingly involves partnering with local populations rather than imposing external solutions.
paragraphs.zh: 原住民社区拥有世代相传的宝贵森林管理知识。他们的管护往往比传统的保护项目更有效地保护森林。成功的植树造林越来越多地涉及与当地居民合作，而非强加外部解决方案。

paragraphs.en: Reforestation represents one valuable tool among many needed to address climate change. It cannot substitute for reducing fossil fuel consumption or transforming industrial systems. However, when implemented thoughtfully, restoring forests contributes to a healthier planet while providing numerous co-benefits for biodiversity and human communities.
paragraphs.zh: 植树造林是应对气候变化所需的众多宝贵工具之一。它不能替代减少化石燃料消费或改造工业系统。然而，如果深思熟虑地实施，恢复森林有助于地球更健康，同时为生物多样性和人类社区带来众多附带效益。
